DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER LUSHTAK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The Complaint is not uncertain and adequately alleges a cognizable claim. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

(Galina Zhukovsky who is not a party to the case was present in court. She was given a copy of the order prepared by the court.)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Continued To Mar-02-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey B. Neustadt, Esq., of the Law Offices of Jeffrey B. Neustadt, Tel. 415.434.4440, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Nick Shmuylovich, Tel. 415.750.1353, self-represented plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ALEXANDER LUSHTAK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 2, 2012. The moving party is to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. (The opposing party provided courtesy copies of the opposition papers.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
